entries.name: Swiss International
entries.philosophy: Grid is law. Type does the heavy lifting. Decoration is failure.

tokens.borders: hairline (1px), pure or near-black, used as separators only
tokens.shadows: none — depth comes from spacing, not light
tokens.type: Helvetica/Inter at strict ratios (1.2 or 1.25), generous tracking on caps
tokens.color: black on white, single accent at <60% saturation used 1-2% of surface area
tokens.motion: linear or instant, no flourish

entries.notes: The trap is mistaking minimalism for blankness — Swiss is precise placement, not empty canvas.

entries.name: Monochrome Precise
entries.philosophy: Black is chrome, white is canvas, negative space is the system. Color belongs to content.

tokens.shadows: shadow-xs to shadow-md, never tinted, never colored
tokens.type: Inter or Geist, weights 400/500/600, tight line-heights at 1.4-1.5
tokens.color: zinc/neutral 50-950 only, one brand dot of color allowed as the mark
tokens.motion: instant to fast (100-200ms), ease-out for entries

entries.notes: Easy to drift into gray-on-gray mush — keep type contrast at WCAG AAA for body.

entries.name: Neo-Brutalism
entries.philosophy: Raw, intentionally crude, high-contrast geometry. Rejects polish in favor of presence.

tokens.shadows: harsh hard-edge offsets (e.g., 6px 6px 0 #000), never blurred
tokens.type: wild contrast, mono + display mix, italic accents, oversized headlines
tokens.color: high saturation primaries — electric yellow, hot pink, cobalt, often clashing
tokens.motion: abrupt, no easing, snap transitions

entries.notes: Don't add gradients. Don't soften edges. The whole point is the edge.

entries.name: Brutalism Raw
entries.philosophy: Web as document. HTML defaults are the design. Nothing hidden, nothing styled away.

tokens.shadows: none, ever
tokens.type: Times New Roman or system serif, unstyled headings, blue underlined links
tokens.color: raw blue links, black on white, near-zero palette
tokens.motion: none — page reloads, no JS choreography

entries.notes: The risk is faking it with styled-to-look-unstyled — true brutalism uses defaults, not imitation.

entries.name: Industrial Brutalist
entries.philosophy: Concrete in pixel form. Heavy, blocky, monospace, no apology.

tokens.borders: 5-10px solid concrete-gray or black, sometimes inset/double
tokens.shadows: none or hard-block (no blur)
tokens.type: monospace dominant (JetBrains Mono, IBM Plex Mono), all-caps headlines, condensed
tokens.color: concrete grays, oxidized rust, blackened steel, single safety-orange accent
tokens.motion: mechanical — linear curves, no spring physics

entries.notes: The trap is making it 'tough' with skull icons — restraint is what makes the weight land.

entries.name: Editorial Magazine
entries.philosophy: Long-form reading is the design problem. Type sets the rhythm; everything else serves the eye.

tokens.borders: subtle (0.5-1px), often horizontal rules between sections only
tokens.shadows: none — flat typography surfaces
tokens.type: serif body (Tiempos, Söhne, GT Sectra), display heads with optical sizing, drop caps
tokens.color: off-white pages (#FAF8F3), warm blacks (#1A1714), one editorial accent
tokens.motion: fade-in on scroll, no parallax, page transitions feel like turning a page

entries.notes: Don't apply this to product UI — the type rhythm collapses without paragraphs to anchor it.

entries.name: Editorial Warm
entries.philosophy: Magazine craft with warmth — cream paper, coral accent, serif body. Reading should feel like an object you'd buy.

tokens.shadows: shadow-sm with a warm tint, very rare
tokens.type: serif (GT Sectra, Tiempos) for headlines, humanist sans for UI (Söhne, Inter)
tokens.color: cream (#F8F1E5), coral or terracotta accent, warm dark (#2B2520)
tokens.motion: slow fades, no bounce, 400-600ms transitions

entries.notes: Beware of going generic 'beige aesthetic' — the coral or terracotta accent is what stops it being a Pinterest mood board.

entries.name: Newspaper Long-form
entries.philosophy: Front page of a respected paper. Density without clutter. Hierarchy by type weight and width.

tokens.borders: 1px ink-black hairlines between columns and sections
tokens.shadows: none — print metaphor
tokens.type: serif headlines (Cheltenham, Miller, Georgia), sans body or serif body, multi-column layouts
tokens.color: off-white (#F4F0EA), ink black (#111), one section-color stripe
tokens.motion: minimal — fades for content swap, no flourish

entries.notes: Don't try to be 'mobile-first newspaper' — the form lives on the column grid; respect it or pick another style.

entries.name: Glassmorphism
entries.philosophy: Translucent panels floating over color. Depth through blur, not shadow.

tokens.shadows: soft, large radius, low opacity (e.g., 0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.1))
tokens.type: geometric sans (SF Pro, Inter), medium weights, high contrast on glass
tokens.color: vibrant gradient backgrounds, panels at 10-30% alpha, white or near-white text
tokens.motion: smooth ease-out, blur transitions feel airy

entries.notes: The default AI move — make sure the blur is doing visual work, not hiding a lack of design decisions.

entries.name: Apple Liquid Glass
entries.philosophy: Glass that bends light and adapts to content underneath. Material with physics, not a Photoshop filter.

tokens.borders: 1px gradient highlight (top-light, bottom-dark) simulating glass edges
tokens.shadows: layered — outer drop + inner highlight + ambient occlusion
tokens.type: SF Pro Display / Text, dynamic type respected, weight shifts with size
tokens.color: system colors that adapt to wallpaper, vibrancy and saturation pulled from background
tokens.radius: continuous corner (squircle) — never circular, never sharp
tokens.motion: spring physics, 60fps interruptible, parallax with depth

entries.notes: Squircles (not rounded rectangles) are the tell — getting the corner curvature wrong reads as fake-Apple.

entries.name: Bento Modular
entries.philosophy: Marketing as a grid of self-contained windows. Each cell tells a small story; the grid tells the big one.

tokens.shadows: shadow-md to shadow-xl on hover, often a soft diffusion shadow
tokens.type: large display headlines per cell, body inside cells caps at 2-3 lines
tokens.color: alternating tinted surfaces, each cell its own mini palette, brand color as the binder
tokens.radius: 16-24px, occasionally one signature 2.5rem cell for hero
tokens.motion: hover-lift on cells, cursor parallax inside cells, no autoplay scroll-jacking

entries.notes: Bento done badly is just a 3x3 with no idea per cell — every cell needs a reason to exist.

entries.name: Claymorphism
entries.philosophy: Soft, pillow-like 3D forms. Friendly, tactile, child-of-Figma aesthetic.

tokens.shadows: double soft shadows (light from top, ambient from bottom), large radius
tokens.type: rounded geometric sans (Nunito, Quicksand), high weight (600-700), generous spacing
tokens.color: pastel base (lavender, mint, peach), saturation 40-60%, no pure white
tokens.motion: spring-soft (stiffness 60, damping 14), gentle bounce on press

entries.notes: Easy to push into Fisher-Price territory — keep the type discipline tight to avoid babyish drift.

entries.name: Neumorphism
entries.philosophy: Surfaces that look pressed-in or pushed-out from the same material. Soft, monochromatic UI sculpture.
when_to_skip: any flow that needs strong CTAs

tokens.shadows: twin shadows (top-left light, bottom-right dark) of same surface color shifted ±5-10% lightness
tokens.type: geometric sans, low contrast against surface (intentional)
tokens.color: single base color (often light gray #E0E5EC), everything is that color ±10%
tokens.motion: press-in on click — invert shadows briefly to simulate physical button

entries.notes: WCAG-hostile by default — contrast never gets above 3:1 on body. Use sparingly and provide a high-contrast mode.

entries.name: Maximalist / Anti-Design
entries.philosophy: More is more. Stacked patterns, clashing color, intentional ugly. Rejects taste.

tokens.borders: thick, dashed, neon, sometimes barbed — anything BUT neutral hairlines
tokens.shadows: long, colored, multiple per element, glow on glow
tokens.type: blackletter + chrome + pixel + handwriting in a single composition
tokens.color: every primary at full saturation, often inverted backgrounds mid-page
tokens.motion: marquee scrolls, autoplay sound, GIFs, blink

entries.notes: Stop before it crosses from intentional ugly into broken — there's a line, find it.

entries.name: Cyberpunk Neon
entries.philosophy: Night city palette: neon signs over wet pavement. Glow, scan lines, terminal-as-UI.

tokens.shadows: neon glow (text-shadow + box-shadow same color), scan-line overlays
tokens.type: monospace (JetBrains Mono, Berkeley Mono) for chrome, condensed display for headers
tokens.color: deep navy/violet base (#0A0E27), cyan (#00F5FF) + magenta (#FF006E) accents
tokens.motion: glitch on hover, scan-line sweeps, brief CRT flicker on enter

entries.notes: Without restraint this becomes a parody of itself — limit scan-line/glitch effects to entry moments, not constant noise.

entries.name: Vaporwave / Retro-Wave
entries.philosophy: 80s mall in synthwave palette. Greek statues, gridlines, palm trees, sunset gradient. Ironic nostalgia.

tokens.borders: thin pink/cyan, gridline patterns over backgrounds
tokens.shadows: neon glow on type, chromatic aberration
tokens.type: wide retro display (VCR OSD, Monoton, Audiowide), Helvetica for body
tokens.color: pink (#FF6AC1), cyan (#01CDFE), purple sunset gradient, marble white
tokens.motion: VHS tracking glitches, slow zoom on statues, slow gradient drift

entries.notes: Has to commit fully — half-vaporwave reads as a typo, not a style.

entries.name: Solarpunk / Eco
entries.philosophy: Optimistic future where nature and tech merge. Living surfaces, plants, hand-drawn detail, warm sun.

tokens.shadows: soft, warm (amber-tinted), as if from sunlight
tokens.type: humanist sans (Söhne, Lyon), occasional serif for warmth, slab for headers
tokens.color: leaf-green (#5C8A3A), terracotta, ochre, warm cream, deep moss
tokens.motion: slow grow/leaf-unfurl animations, particles drifting, never abrupt

entries.notes: Don't let the leaves become decoration — every organic element should imply the brand's actual relationship with the natural system.

entries.name: Skeuomorphic Modern
entries.philosophy: Digital surfaces that remember their analog parents. Paper, fabric, wood, leather — rendered with restraint, not maximalism.

tokens.shadows: object-realistic — directional, soft, ambient occlusion
tokens.type: serif body for paper-products, display sans for chrome
tokens.color: warm material palettes — cream paper, walnut wood, oxblood leather
tokens.radius: varies by material — paper sharp, leather rounded
tokens.motion: page-turn animations, knob rotation, physical-feel response

entries.notes: The 2007 iOS skeuomorphism was rejected for a reason — modern skeuo is metaphor, not literal imitation.

entries.name: Y2K Revival
entries.philosophy: Early-2000s web optimism: chrome, gradients, bubble buttons, Windows XP rolling hills. Earnest, not ironic.
when_to_skip: anything that needs to feel modern-enterprise

tokens.shadows: inner light + outer drop, glossy reflections
tokens.type: bubbly sans (Comic Neue, FA Sans Bubble), or chrome-effect display
tokens.color: metallic silver, baby blue, bubblegum pink, neon green
tokens.motion: bouncy, GIF-like, marquee scrolls, sparkle effects

entries.notes: Don't add an ironic wink — Y2K works because it commits earnestly to a moment, not because it's making fun of it.

entries.name: Dark Mode Luxe
entries.philosophy: Premium products in deep dark. Gold/champagne accent. Pure black banned — atmosphere lives in the warm darks.

tokens.borders: 0.5-1px champagne-gold or muted gold, used as separators
tokens.shadows: subtle inner glow, ambient warmth — never neon
tokens.type: serif display (Söhne, GT Sectra) + thin humanist sans, generous tracking on caps
tokens.color: warm dark base (#0E0B08), champagne (#D4AF7A), cream text (#F5EBDD)
tokens.motion: slow, deliberate — 400-800ms fades, no spring, no bounce

entries.notes: Gold on pure black reads as casino — use warm dark (#0E0B08) and the gold becomes elegant.

entries.name: Gradient Sunset
entries.philosophy: Bold marketing surfaces in warm gradients. Sun-down palettes, instagram-glow, hero panels that look like the sky.

tokens.shadows: colored ambient glows, not crisp shadows
tokens.type: geometric sans, large display weights, often centered
tokens.color: magenta→orange→amber, blue→purple→pink, sunset blends
tokens.motion: slow gradient drift (8-15s loops), subtle position shifts

entries.notes: The default AI gradient is blue→purple — push to magenta→amber or amber→teal to break out of generic.

entries.name: Stripe-style Documentation
entries.philosophy: Technical docs as a product surface. Calm, dense, scannable. Code is first-class content.

tokens.borders: 1px hairline, light gray, used between sections and around code blocks
tokens.shadows: shadow-xs on cards, very subtle, rarely
tokens.type: Inter or Söhne for body, monospace (Söhne Mono, JetBrains) for code, 14-16px body
tokens.color: white/zinc-50 base, accent indigo or violet for links, syntax-highlighted code
tokens.motion: instant or near-instant — no spring, no flourish, fast scroll-into-view

entries.notes: Avoid drifting into marketing-page gradients — docs surfaces stay calm to keep developer trust.

entries.name: Material Expressive 3
entries.philosophy: Google's expressive evolution — bold shapes, dynamic color from wallpaper/brand, expressive type, motion as identity.

tokens.borders: 0 mostly — color and shape carry hierarchy
tokens.shadows: elevation system (1dp-24dp), tinted to surface color
tokens.type: Google Sans Display + Text, variable weights, expressive scale jumps
tokens.color: dynamic color from theme source, vibrant tonal palettes
tokens.radius: shape morphing — buttons squish on press, varied radii (8/16/28/full)
tokens.motion: easing emphasized (340ms), springs on interaction, shape morph transitions

entries.notes: Shape morphing on interaction is the M3 signature — without it, this is just round-rect Material 2.

entries.name: Aurora Iridescent
entries.philosophy: Shifting prismatic surfaces — northern lights, oil-on-water, holographic foil. Color that changes with viewing angle.

tokens.shadows: colored glows shifting through hue range
tokens.type: geometric sans for chrome (Inter, Space Grotesk), large weights on heroes
tokens.color: multi-stop gradients shifting through spectrum, holographic foil simulations
tokens.motion: slow hue rotation (15-30s), cursor-reactive gradient angle, no autoplay overload

entries.notes: Confine iridescent to hero panels — full-page holographic reads as a screensaver, not a product.

entries.name: Discord Chat-UI
entries.philosophy: Three-pane chat: server rail, channel list, conversation. Dense, friendly-dark, optimized for live presence.

tokens.shadows: shadow-md on modals, none on inline UI
tokens.type: Whitney/gg-sans humanist for body, Uni-Sans for headers, 14-15px chat density
tokens.color: blurple (#5865F2) accent, dark navy panels, light text
tokens.radius: 8-16px on bubbles, full on avatars, 6px on inputs
tokens.motion: instant for hovers, fast spring for modal entries, presence pulses

entries.notes: Three-pane is the template — going two-pane breaks the muscle memory users have from Discord/Slack.

entries.name: Linear Precise Dark
entries.philosophy: Engineering taste at the OS level. Sharp dark, hairline borders, keyboard-first, no decoration.

tokens.borders: 1px zinc-800, hairline, used for separation not decoration
tokens.shadows: shadow-sm at most, never colored, never atmospheric
tokens.type: Inter Variable, weights 400/500/600, 14px default body, tight line-heights
tokens.color: deep neutral dark (#0A0A0A surface, #1A1A1A elevated), single indigo or violet accent
tokens.radius: 6-8px on buttons, 10-12px on cards, never pill
tokens.motion: instant (100ms) for state, fast spring (snappy) for entries, never bouncy

entries.notes: Keyboard shortcut affordances are part of the visual language — without ⌘K hints this drifts toward generic dark mode.

entries.name: Notion Soft Document
entries.philosophy: Personal-wiki softness. Generous whitespace, soft callouts, friendly icons, document-as-database.

tokens.borders: 0 mostly — soft tinted backgrounds carry hierarchy
tokens.shadows: shadow-xs on hover, gentle, ambient
tokens.type: Inter for body, soft serifs allowed for documents, 16-18px reading size
tokens.color: off-white base, soft tints (peach, mint, blue) for callouts, neutral grays for chrome
tokens.motion: ease-out 200-300ms, no bounce, hover-lift on blocks

entries.notes: Easy to make this read 'generic doc app' — character comes from typography decisions and tint discipline, not block shapes.

entries.name: Raycast Command Bar
entries.philosophy: Single-input launcher aesthetic. Fast, monospace-flavored, keyboard-first, fast-forward animations.

tokens.borders: 1px subtle, occasional rounded outer border on the launcher itself
tokens.shadows: shadow-xl outer (large blur, low alpha), creates floating-window feel
tokens.type: system sans (SF Pro, Inter), some monospace for shortcuts, 13-14px body
tokens.color: deep dark (#0D0D0F), red accent for Raycast (or indigo for variants)
tokens.motion: instant (no delay) for focus and rows, fast spring for opens/closes

entries.notes: The speed is the design — animations longer than 200ms break the launcher illusion.

entries.name: Vercel Precision
entries.philosophy: Black canvas, white type, geometric precision. Engineering brand as fashion brand.

tokens.shadows: none in dark mode, shadow-sm in light
tokens.type: Geist or Inter, weights 400-700, large display, tight kerning on heads
tokens.color: pure dark/light contrast, single accent geometric pop (often pink or amber)
tokens.motion: fast (150ms) ease-out, no bounce, page transitions feel instant

entries.notes: The trap is making it too cold — Vercel's character comes from typography character, not just black backgrounds.

entries.name: Arc Browser Playful
entries.philosophy: Browser as personality. Soft animations, expressive color choices per-space, generous padding, mac-native feel.

tokens.borders: 0 — colored backgrounds and gradients carry hierarchy
tokens.shadows: soft layered shadows for floating panels, ambient warmth
tokens.type: Inter or rounded sans, expressive scale, casual headlines
tokens.color: spaces have themes (sunset, aurora, mono), accent per-context, friendly defaults
tokens.radius: 16-24px on panels, full on avatars, 10-12px on buttons
tokens.motion: spring physics on every interaction, playful but not childish, tab-switching as choreography

entries.notes: Playful without committing to specific motion is just gradient-soup — the spring physics is the brand.

entries.name: Japanese Zen
entries.philosophy: Ma — the negative space between elements is part of the composition. Asymmetric, restrained, paper-and-ink.

tokens.borders: 0 to single hairline — only where the eye needs guidance
tokens.shadows: none — surfaces are paper, not layered
tokens.type: Noto Serif JP + humanist sans, vertical text supported, ample tracking
tokens.color: washi cream (#F8F4ED), sumi ink (#1C1A17), single seasonal accent (sakura pink, indigo)
tokens.motion: very slow fade-ins (600-900ms), no bounce, scroll feels meditative

entries.notes: Don't confuse Zen with empty — every void has a purpose, every element is placed deliberately.

entries.name: Scandinavian Quiet
entries.philosophy: Hygge in pixels. Warm muted neutrals, generous space, restrained typography, function-first warmth.

tokens.shadows: shadow-xs and shadow-sm only, warm-tinted
tokens.type: humanist sans (Söhne, GT America), occasional serif for warmth, 16-18px body
tokens.color: warm neutrals (cream, oat, stone), accent in muted forest or terracotta
tokens.motion: slow ease-out (300-450ms), no bounce, calm transitions

entries.notes: Going too restrained becomes invisible — keep one warm accent doing visible work.

entries.name: MENA Elegant
entries.philosophy: Arabic-first elegance — calligraphic display, generous space, RTL-native rhythm, warm cream surfaces.

tokens.borders: 1px warm gold or warm-taupe, used between sections
tokens.shadows: shadow-sm, ambient warmth
tokens.type: IBM Plex Sans Arabic + Tajawal (Arabic), Söhne (Latin), slightly smaller scale ratio for Arabic glyph weight
tokens.color: cream (#F8F1E5), warm dark (#2B2520), gold (#C4A36A) or deep teal accent
tokens.motion: slow fade-ins, RTL-aware direction, no Western chevron defaults

entries.notes: Apply RTL logical properties throughout — `margin-inline-start` not `margin-left`. Arabic glyphs are visually heavier; reduce scale ratio.

entries.name: Academic Paper
entries.philosophy: Journal article in web form. Serif body, footnotes, citation rigor. Reading is a long-form act.

tokens.shadows: none — print metaphor
tokens.type: Computer Modern, Tiempos, or Georgia serif body at 18-19px, generous line-height (1.7)
tokens.color: off-white (#F9F7F2), ink black, single citation-blue link color
tokens.motion: minimal — anchor-link smooth scroll, fade-in for footnotes

entries.notes: Don't shorten the line length to mobile-feel widths — academic reading wants 60-75 chars per line.

entries.name: Fintech Precise
entries.philosophy: Numbers are the design. Tabular type, generous numeric whitespace, semantic color for direction (gain/loss), no decoration.

tokens.borders: 1px zinc-200, used on tables and inputs only
tokens.shadows: shadow-xs on cards, shadow-sm on modals, never colored
tokens.type: Inter tabular numerals + monospace for code/IDs, 14-15px table body
tokens.color: neutral base, emerald-600 for gains, rose-600 for losses, no warning yellows in critical paths
tokens.motion: instant on state, fast on entries, no celebratory animations

entries.notes: Don't add gradient hero cards — fintech trust comes from boring precision, not marketing flair.

entries.name: Medical Clinical
entries.philosophy: Clinical clarity — high contrast, large hit targets, generous spacing, semantic color used only for safety states.

tokens.shadows: shadow-sm at most, no atmospheric depth
tokens.type: Inter or Atkinson Hyperlegible, 16-18px body minimum, ADA-AA throughout
tokens.color: white base, dark text (zinc-950), blue-700 for action, amber-700 for caution, red-700 for danger — never lighter
tokens.motion: instant — no animations on critical states, fade only for non-critical

entries.notes: Aesthetic restraint isn't dullness — every visual decision needs to support clinician trust and patient legibility.

entries.name: SaaS Stripe-Modern
entries.philosophy: Marketing hero gradients + clean docs + dashboard precision. The full modern-SaaS template.

tokens.borders: 1px hairline in docs, 0 in hero marketing
tokens.shadows: atmospheric soft in marketing, shadow-xs in product UI
tokens.type: Inter or Söhne, weights 400-700, large hero display, 14-16px body
tokens.color: indigo/violet gradient heroes, white/zinc surfaces in product, accent indigo
tokens.motion: gradient drift in hero, instant in product

entries.notes: This is what every AI defaults to — to differentiate, push one variable hard (type, color, or motion) instead of all moderately.

entries.name: Terminal CRT
entries.philosophy: Phosphor green on black, scan lines, monospace everywhere. The terminal as nostalgia object and modern tool.

tokens.shadows: outer green glow on text, CRT bloom
tokens.type: monospace exclusively (Berkeley Mono, IBM Plex Mono, Hack)
tokens.color: phosphor green (#00FF6A) or amber (#FFB000) on near-black (#0A0E0A), one alert red
tokens.motion: type-on effect for headers, blinking cursor, scan-line sweep on entry

entries.notes: Type-on effects become annoying if used on every header — reserve for hero moments.

entries.name: Pastoral Soft Editorial
entries.philosophy: Magazine softness with countryside palette. Botanical illustration, soft serifs, generous breathable rhythm.

tokens.borders: 1px sage-green or muted-rose, occasionally botanical illustration as divider
tokens.shadows: shadow-sm, warm and ambient
tokens.type: serif heads (GT Sectra, Domaine Display), humanist sans body, italic accents
tokens.color: sage (#A8B89E), rose (#D9A8A0), cream (#FAF5E9), warm dark
tokens.motion: slow scroll-fades, no bounce, leaf-fall particles allowed in hero

entries.notes: Botanical illustration is the differentiator — without it this drops to generic 'soft beige' Pinterest.

entries.name: Swiss Grid Data
entries.philosophy: Information design from Tufte's lineage. Type, grid, sparkline, no decoration. Data is the design.

tokens.borders: 0.5px hairlines for axis lines and table separators
tokens.shadows: none — flat
tokens.type: Söhne or Inter at 14px tabular, monospace for code/IDs
tokens.color: white base, black/near-black text, max 5 categorical colors (ColorBrewer)
tokens.motion: instant — no transitions on data updates, scroll-into-view fade only

entries.notes: Resist colorful chart defaults — categorical colors should be perceptually distinct, not maximally saturated.

entries.name: Pitch Deck Modern
entries.philosophy: Investor-deck aesthetic translated to web. Large stats, oversized hero numbers, bento-grid feature spread.

tokens.borders: 0 on hero bento cells, 1px on data tables
tokens.shadows: shadow-xl on bento cells, soft and diffused
tokens.type: Inter or Söhne, extreme display sizes for stats (96-160px), 16-18px body
tokens.color: white base, single dominant brand accent, neutral grays for body chrome
tokens.radius: 16-24px on bento cells, signature 2.5rem on hero
tokens.motion: scroll-driven counter animations on stats, parallax on bento cells

entries.notes: The oversized stat is a cliché now — back the number with proof, not just a big numeral.

entries.name: Swiss Poster
entries.philosophy: International Typographic Style as web. Type as image, asymmetric composition, color used as field not decoration.

tokens.shadows: none
tokens.type: Akzidenz-Grotesk, Helvetica, Inter — huge sizes (200-400px) used as image
tokens.color: single block of saturated color as background, type in pure black or white
tokens.motion: instant or single-fade entry, no interaction-flourish

entries.notes: Composition asymmetry is mandatory — centered Swiss-poster reads as default web, not as the style.

entries.name: Art Portfolio Image-First
entries.philosophy: Images are the work; chrome disappears. Edge-to-edge media, captions whisper, navigation hidden until needed.

tokens.shadows: none on images, occasional shadow-sm on captions
tokens.type: small, restrained — 12-14px captions, single bold title face
tokens.color: neutral white or near-black base, images supply all chroma
tokens.motion: smooth horizontal/vertical scroll, slow image fades, no parallax tricks

entries.notes: Don't add hero gradients or marketing patterns — the work has to do the talking, chrome is invisible.

entries.name: Data-Viz Dense
entries.philosophy: Bloomberg terminal aesthetic for the web. Dense rows, multiple panels, color-coded states, every pixel earns its place.

tokens.borders: 0.5px hairline between every row and column
tokens.shadows: none — flat density
tokens.type: monospace (Berkeley Mono, IBM Plex Mono) at 12-13px, tabular figures
tokens.color: near-black surface, semantic chips (green up, red down, amber warn), no decoration color
tokens.motion: instant — data updates flash briefly (50-100ms), no animations beyond

entries.notes: Every visual decision has to support fast scanning — beautiful-but-slow is wrong here.

entries.name: Paper Craft
entries.philosophy: Cut-and-folded paper as UI metaphor. Layered cards with hand-cut edges, soft shadows, paper-grain texture.

tokens.shadows: double soft shadows simulating paper-on-paper depth
tokens.type: rounded humanist sans (Quicksand, Nunito) or hand-lettered display
tokens.color: warm paper-cream, watercolor accents, pencil-gray text
tokens.motion: paper-flip transitions, layer-shift on hover, gentle

entries.notes: Cheap paper texture is the failure mode — use subtle grain, not stock-photo paper backgrounds.

entries.name: Blueprint Architectural
entries.philosophy: Technical drawing as web aesthetic. Cyan-on-white-paper, dimension lines, callouts, drafting precision.

tokens.borders: 1px cyan (#0066CC) or dark navy on white, dashed for callouts
tokens.shadows: none — drafting paper is flat
tokens.type: drafting-style sans (Roboto Mono for measurements, Helvetica for labels), all-caps
tokens.color: cyan blueprint blue, drafting-paper cream, single accent red for warnings
tokens.radius: 0 — technical drawing has no rounded corners by default
tokens.motion: instant or technical reveal (build-up of line work, no flourish)

entries.notes: Real architectural drawings have measurement annotations — adding callout dimensions to UI elements sells the metaphor.

entries.name: Hospitality Warm Luxe
entries.philosophy: Hotel lobby in pixel form. Warm cream, brass accents, generous space, slow elegance. Trust without coldness.

tokens.borders: 0.5-1px brass (#B8985E) or warm-taupe, used between sections
tokens.shadows: shadow-md with warm tint, ambient
tokens.type: serif display (GT Sectra, Söhne) + humanist sans body, generous spacing
tokens.color: cream (#FAF4E8), warm dark (#1F1B16), brass (#B8985E)
tokens.motion: slow (500-700ms) fades, no bounce, page transitions feel like turning brochure pages

entries.notes: Brass not gold — gold reads cheap, brass reads heritage.

entries.name: Fashion Monochrome
entries.philosophy: High-fashion editorial restraint. Type as logo, oversized imagery, white space, no decoration that distracts from the work.

tokens.shadows: none
tokens.type: condensed display (GT America Condensed, Druk), italic accents, generous tracking on labels
tokens.color: pure white/pure black contrast, single editorial accent (often blood-red or cobalt)
tokens.motion: slow fades, parallax restrained, hover-zoom on product images

entries.notes: It's not just black-and-white — the type discipline, the editorial photography, the spacing are what separate fashion from generic minimal.

entries.name: Music Album Art
entries.philosophy: Microsite as album cover. Whole-page hero image, type as artwork, full-bleed expression. The record is the design.

tokens.shadows: drop shadows on type for legibility over imagery
tokens.type: expressive — custom display per release, often paired with one humanist body sans
tokens.color: pulled entirely from the album artwork
tokens.motion: slow zoom on hero image, type entry choreography, autoplay audio with intent

entries.notes: Audio autoplay only with user gesture — modern browsers block it anyway, but make it discoverable.

entries.name: Crypto Web3 Precise
entries.philosophy: Sharp dark, technical typography, accent neon, blockchain-as-UI. Restraint instead of degenerate-gambler aesthetic.

tokens.borders: 1px subtle dark, occasional 1px neon (electric blue) accent
tokens.shadows: shadow-sm to shadow-md, occasional subtle neon glow on focus states
tokens.type: Inter or Geist + monospace (Berkeley) for code/addresses, address truncation as type ritual
tokens.color: deep navy (#0A0D14), neon mint (#3EE6A4) or electric blue (#3D7EFF) accent
tokens.motion: fast spring on transactions, no celebration overload, success states restrained

entries.notes: Avoid degenerate-gambler aesthetic (gold coins, flame icons, rocket emojis) — credibility comes from technical precision.

entries.name: AI Product Marketing
entries.philosophy: AI brand surfaces — gradient meshes, glow rings, conversational UI hero shots, future-soft palettes.

tokens.shadows: colored ambient glows, never hard-edge
tokens.type: Inter or Söhne, restrained body, large gradient-fill display headlines
tokens.color: soft gradient meshes (peach→lilac→mint), often with one accent (orange or violet)
tokens.motion: slow gradient mesh drift, conversational typing animation, restraint over flash

entries.notes: Generic AI marketing reads as a brand-colored cloud — push the gradient choices beyond the obvious indigo→pink default.

entries.name: Dribbble SaaS Dashboard
entries.philosophy: The aesthetic that every Tailwind UI competitor ships. Card with chart, sidebar, gradient stat. Default modern dashboard.
when_to_use: quick MVPs that need to look 'designed'
B2B SaaS that wants to look mainstream
when_to_skip: anything where 'looks like every other SaaS' is a critique

tokens.shadows: shadow-sm to shadow-md on cards, sometimes colored
tokens.type: Inter or Geist, 14-16px body, 24-36px section headers
tokens.color: indigo-600 or violet-600 primary, neutral grays, semantic green/red
tokens.motion: fast ease-out on hover, 150-200ms

entries.notes: This IS the AI default — if you want to differentiate, change one fundamental: type, color, or density.

entries.name: Minimal Portfolio
entries.philosophy: Designer-portfolio restraint. One column, type-led, work links lowered, attention on craft not chrome.

tokens.shadows: none
tokens.type: single serif or sans family, 18-20px body, generous line-height
tokens.color: white or off-white base, near-black text, no accent color (or one restrained warm accent)
tokens.motion: instant on links, slow on page transitions, no flourish

entries.notes: Don't add gradients to compensate for empty space — empty space IS the design.

entries.name: Agency Brutalist Modern
entries.philosophy: Design studio swagger — oversized type, aggressive grid, scroll choreography, GSAP-driven entries.

tokens.borders: thick (3-6px) when present, often horizontal divider blocks
tokens.shadows: harsh offset shadows, rarely soft
tokens.type: huge display (120-300px), often custom typeface, mix of serif and sans
tokens.color: off-white base, single saturated accent (electric blue, hot pink, acid yellow), pure black
tokens.motion: scroll-driven choreography (GSAP), type morph on scroll, image reveals

entries.notes: Scroll choreography is the brand — without GSAP/Framer Motion timeline work this becomes static and ordinary.

entries.name: Soft 3D Illustration
entries.philosophy: Spline-rendered shapes, pillow blobs, ambient occlusion, Y2K-meets-modern. 3D as decoration, not metaphor.

tokens.shadows: ambient occlusion baked into 3D, soft drop shadows under shapes
tokens.type: rounded geometric sans (Söhne, Inter), medium weights, restraint vs the 3D
tokens.color: soft gradient surfaces in shapes, neutral page background
tokens.radius: 16-24px on cards, shapes are organic blobs
tokens.motion: slow rotation on 3D objects (15-30s loops), cursor-tracked parallax

entries.notes: Spline blobs are an AI-marketing cliché now — if you use 3D, it should reference something specific to the product.

entries.name: Isometric Tech
entries.philosophy: Diagonal 30/60 projection. Pixel illustration revival — buildings, devices, robots in clean isometric.

tokens.borders: 1-2px solid, often colored stroke on illustrations
tokens.shadows: flat shadows at consistent angle, no atmospheric depth
tokens.type: geometric sans (Inter, Söhne), restrained body to let illustrations breathe
tokens.color: flat illustration palettes — 4-6 colors max, often pastel + black outlines
tokens.radius: 0 in illustration (sharp polygons), 8-12px in UI chrome
tokens.motion: isolated illustration animation (one element moves at a time), parallax on hover

entries.notes: Isometric illustrations went generic around 2018 — to avoid the cliché, the illustrations need to be specific (your product's actual objects, not stock characters).

entries.name: Biotech Clinical Modern
entries.philosophy: Lab precision in pixels. Pale science palette, sans-serif rigor, restrained color reserved for status, organic shapes used sparingly.

tokens.shadows: shadow-xs on cards, shadow-sm on modals
tokens.type: Söhne or Inter, restrained weights (400-600), generous spacing, lab-form numerals
tokens.color: clinical white, ice-blue accent, single deep navy or moss for credibility
tokens.motion: instant on state, slow (400-600ms) on transitions, no celebratory animation

entries.notes: Avoid stock photos of test tubes or DNA helices — they read as generic biotech. Use abstract science-inspired patterns instead.

entries.name: Video Streaming Immersive
entries.philosophy: TV-app aesthetic in browser. Edge-to-edge poster art, gradient overlays for legibility, generous focus rings, content-first.

tokens.shadows: gradient overlays on imagery for text contrast
tokens.type: geometric sans (Inter, Söhne) at large display sizes, restrained body
tokens.color: deep dark (#0F0F11), poster imagery supplies palette, single accent for focus
tokens.radius: 8-12px on poster cards, 0 in player chrome
tokens.motion: slow hero auto-scroll, smooth focus-ring transitions, parallax tile entries

entries.notes: Focus rings are the design — TV-app accessibility lives or dies by the visible-keyboard-focus indicator.

entries.name: Warm Marketplace
entries.philosophy: Independent-marketplace warmth. Hand-curated feel, generous product photography, soft cream palette, anti-Amazon.

tokens.borders: 0.5-1px warm-taupe between sections, hairline on inputs
tokens.shadows: shadow-sm warm-tinted on product cards
tokens.type: humanist sans (Söhne, GT America) body, serif headlines for editorial moments
tokens.color: cream base (#F8F1E5), warm dark text, accent terracotta or sage
tokens.motion: ease-out 250-350ms, gentle hover-lift, no bounce

entries.notes: Warmth lives in the photography style — without curated product imagery, this reads as a generic cream-themed shop.

entries.name: Kids Playful Rounded
entries.philosophy: Soft rounded shapes, oversized friendly type, primary saturated palette, generous tap targets. Built for small fingers.
when_to_skip: anything for adults that needs gravitas

tokens.shadows: soft, large radius, often colored ambient glow
tokens.type: rounded sans (Quicksand, Nunito) at 18-24px body, oversized display
tokens.color: primary saturated (red, blue, yellow, green) with cream backgrounds
tokens.motion: bouncy spring on every interaction, celebratory micro-animations on success

entries.notes: Saturation has to be high or it reads as 'baby-faded' — kids' eyes respond to vibrant color.

entries.name: Podcast Audio
entries.philosophy: Audio-first marketing — episode covers as hero, transcript-friendly type, generous space for listening surfaces.

tokens.borders: 0 on episode tiles, 1px hairline between sections
tokens.shadows: shadow-sm on episode covers, soft
tokens.type: serif headlines (Söhne, GT Sectra) + humanist sans for transcripts, 18px+ body
tokens.color: cream or pale base, episode-color accents pulled from cover art
tokens.radius: 8-12px on cards, full on play buttons
tokens.motion: slow fade-ins, audio-waveform animations on playback

entries.notes: Waveform animations should be subtle — flashy waveforms distract from the listening intent.

entries.name: Minimalist Mobile App
entries.philosophy: Single-purpose app aesthetic. One screen, one action, no chrome that distracts. Mobile-native restraint.

tokens.shadows: shadow-xs at most
tokens.type: single weight, single family, 17-19px body (iOS native scale)
tokens.color: white or near-black surface, single accent, generous neutral grays
tokens.radius: 12-16px on cards, full on action buttons
tokens.motion: soft spring on every press, slow page transitions

entries.notes: Mobile minimalism fails when navigation gets unclear — restraint requires obvious next steps.

entries.name: Blog Personal Warm
entries.philosophy: Personal essay site — long reading surface, warm typography, generous margins, single column at 600-700px max.

tokens.shadows: none
tokens.type: serif body (GT Sectra, Charter, Iowan Old Style) at 19-21px, line-height 1.7
tokens.color: warm off-white (#F8F4ED), warm dark text, single restrained link color
tokens.motion: instant — no animations on long-form, scroll fade only

entries.notes: Don't add gradients or hero images — long-form is about reading speed, not visual decoration.

entries.name: Newsletter Substack
entries.philosophy: Email-newsletter aesthetic translated to web. Subscribe-first, post-feed, archive-friendly, type-led.

tokens.shadows: shadow-xs on subscribe cards
tokens.type: serif body, sans headers, optimized for email-and-web parity
tokens.color: white or cream base, neutral text, single accent (often orange for Substack-default)
tokens.motion: instant — newsletters reward speed, not flourish

entries.notes: Substack default look is becoming a cliché — adding type personality (custom display, unique link color) breaks the default.

entries.name: Gaming Companion
entries.philosophy: Game-launcher aesthetic — dark surface, neon accent, achievement chips, presence indicators. Built for hype.

tokens.borders: 1px subtle dark, 1-2px neon on focus/active states
tokens.shadows: neon glow on interactive elements, depth on cards
tokens.type: Inter or Geist + display sans for headers, occasional mono for in-game stats
tokens.color: deep navy/violet (#0A0A14), electric accent (cyan, mint, magenta — pick one)
tokens.motion: fast spring, presence pulse, hover-lift on game tiles

entries.notes: RGB-overload (every accent at full neon) is the failure mode — pick ONE accent and hold the line.

entries.name: Ecommerce Minimal Luxury
entries.philosophy: Apparel/object commerce with restraint. Edge-to-edge product photography, type at scale, no decoration competing with the product.

tokens.borders: 0 mostly, 1px hairline on inputs and product specs
tokens.shadows: none on product imagery, shadow-xs on action surfaces
tokens.type: humanist sans (Söhne) or condensed display (GT America) for headers, generous tracking
tokens.color: white base, warm dark text, single editorial accent for sale/info
tokens.radius: 0 to 4px on chrome, 0 on product images
tokens.motion: slow hover-zoom on products, restrained transitions, no flourish

entries.notes: Product photography is 80% of the design — without art-directed images, restraint reads as 'unfinished.'

entries.name: Travel Immersive
entries.philosophy: Place-based marketing — full-bleed location imagery, generous serif headlines, slow scroll, the destination is the design.

tokens.shadows: gradient overlays for text legibility over photography
tokens.type: serif display (GT Sectra, Domaine) for headlines, humanist sans body
tokens.color: imagery supplies palette, neutral cream/warm dark chrome
tokens.motion: slow hero zoom, parallax on scroll (restrained, not seasick), fade-on-scroll text

entries.notes: Parallax overload is the failure mode — slow, intentional movement; never cumulative seasickness.

entries.name: Developer Portfolio Precise
entries.philosophy: Engineer's homepage — terminal-feel, dark surface, project tiles, GitHub-adjacent typography.

tokens.shadows: none on dark, shadow-xs on light variants
tokens.type: Inter or Geist body, monospace (Berkeley, JetBrains) for code/dates
tokens.color: deep dark surface (#0A0A0A), zinc-100 text, single accent (often green or violet)
tokens.motion: instant on hover, fast spring on entries

entries.notes: Personality lives in the type and motion choices — without them this becomes generic dark mode.

entries.name: SaaS Onboarding Warm
entries.philosophy: Onboarding-flow softness. Friendly illustrations, large progress, warm accents, soft animations. The first impression is friendly.

tokens.borders: 0 — illustrations and soft cards carry hierarchy
tokens.shadows: shadow-md soft on cards, shadow-lg on hero illustrations
tokens.type: humanist sans (Söhne) at 16-18px, generous line-height, friendly tone
tokens.color: warm cream/peach surfaces, accent in friendly blue or coral
tokens.motion: spring physics on progress, soft entries, celebratory micro-animation on completion

entries.notes: Friendly illustrations are a default AI move — make sure illustrations are specific to the product, not generic happy people.

entries.name: Civic Public Service
entries.philosophy: Government/civic clarity — high contrast, large type, no decoration, ADA-AAA throughout. Trust through legibility.

tokens.shadows: none — flatness for accessibility
tokens.type: Public Sans, Source Sans Pro, or Atkinson Hyperlegible at 18-20px body
tokens.color: white base, dark text (zinc-950), accessible blue-700 for action, no light gray for content
tokens.motion: instant — never animate critical UI, fade only for non-critical

entries.notes: Accessibility isn't a constraint here — it's the brief. Every visual decision needs to support universal usability.

entries.name: Platform Developer Tools
entries.philosophy: Infrastructure-platform marketing — code snippets as hero, terminal motifs, dark/light parity, dense docs.

tokens.borders: 1px hairline around code blocks, 1px on cards
tokens.shadows: shadow-sm to shadow-md on hero code snippets
tokens.type: Inter or Geist body, monospace (Geist Mono, Berkeley) for code, 14-15px code blocks
tokens.color: near-black or near-white base, syntax-highlighted code, accent indigo or violet
tokens.motion: fast (150ms) ease-out, code-block hover-copy ritual

entries.notes: Code-block-as-hero is a developer-marketing cliché — choose code that demonstrates the product's actual ergonomics, not generic boilerplate.

entries.name: Calendar Time Precise
entries.philosophy: Time as the primary axis. Hairline grids, sharp event blocks, dense time labels, keyboard-shortcut hints visible.

tokens.borders: 1px hairline between hours and days, slightly stronger on day boundaries
tokens.shadows: shadow-xs on event blocks for elevation
tokens.type: Inter tabular for times, 13-14px body, monospace for shortcuts
tokens.color: neutral base, event blocks in restrained tints (not full saturation)
tokens.radius: 4-6px on event blocks, 0 on grid lines
tokens.motion: instant on drag, smooth on event create, fast on view switch

entries.notes: Saturated event blocks become noisy — use tinted (15-25% opacity) blocks against the surface, not full color.

entries.name: Magazine Fashion Editorial
entries.philosophy: High-fashion magazine in browser. Oversized type as image, layered photography, restraint on color, italics as voice.

tokens.shadows: none on imagery, occasional shadow-sm on captions
tokens.type: didone serif (Söhne, Tiempos Headline, GT Sectra) at extreme sizes, italic for voice
tokens.color: off-white or pure black base, single editorial accent (often blood-red or saffron)
tokens.motion: slow scroll-driven type entries, image cross-fades, no JS gimmicks

entries.notes: Italic restraint is the tell — italics as voice (not decoration) is what separates fashion editorial from generic magazine.

entries.name: Data Journalism Rich
entries.philosophy: Scrollytelling with embedded charts. NYT-grade visual essays where the chart, the prose, and the design speak together.

tokens.borders: 0.5px hairlines on axes, 1px between chart sections
tokens.shadows: none — print metaphor
tokens.type: serif body (Söhne, Cheltenham, Charter) + monospace for chart labels, generous reading width
tokens.color: off-white base, ink text, ColorBrewer categorical for charts, single accent for narrative emphasis
tokens.motion: scroll-driven chart reveals, smooth interpolation between data states

entries.notes: Chart-as-decoration is the failure — every chart needs to teach something specific, never wallpaper.

entries.name: Creator Platform Vibrant
entries.philosophy: Creator-economy platform marketing. Bento grids of creator examples, vibrant accent colors, social-proof first.

tokens.shadows: shadow-md on bento cells, shadow-lg on hover
tokens.type: Inter or Söhne, large display, restrained body, vibrant headlines
tokens.color: white base, multi-accent (purple, magenta, amber, mint) used by section
tokens.radius: 16-24px on bento cells, full on action buttons
tokens.motion: hover-lift on cells, cursor parallax, scroll-driven counter-up on stats

entries.notes: Every creator platform now looks the same — to differentiate, pick a type or color that's not in the standard creator-economy palette.

entries.name: AR/VR Spatial Marketing
entries.philosophy: Spatial-computing brand surfaces — 3D-floating panels, depth cues, translucent material, motion that suggests volume.

tokens.shadows: layered shadows simulating depth, ambient occlusion
tokens.type: SF Pro Display, Inter Variable, generous tracking on display
tokens.color: deep dark canvas, translucent panels, single accent that pulls from imagery
tokens.radius: continuous corner squircles, 24-32px on hero panels
tokens.motion: spring physics with depth, gyro-aware parallax on capable devices, panel-emerge entries

entries.notes: Spatial without depth cues is just translucent panels — every visual decision should suggest a third dimension.

entries.name: Indie SaaS Personality
entries.philosophy: Solo-founder product with personality. Big type, opinionated copy, hand-drawn doodles, anti-corporate energy.

tokens.shadows: harsh offsets in brand color or pure black
tokens.type: expressive — display sans + serif mix, large weights, occasional hand-lettered
tokens.color: single distinctive accent (often unconventional — chartreuse, salmon, cobalt), warm or cool base
tokens.motion: personality-driven — bounce on success, jitter on errors, never generic

entries.notes: Personality lives in the copywriting AND the design — without distinctive voice in the words, the visual personality reads as random.

entries.name: Kindle Paperwhite
entries.philosophy: E-ink reader aesthetic in the browser. Off-white surface, ink text, no shadow, no animation. Pure reading.

tokens.shadows: none — e-ink has no depth
tokens.type: serif body (Georgia, Charter, Bookerly equivalent) at 18-20px, line-height 1.6
tokens.color: off-white (#F5F0E5), ink text (#2B2620), no third color
tokens.motion: none — instant page changes, no scroll-fade

entries.notes: Restraint is mandatory — any color or animation breaks the e-ink illusion that makes long reading possible.

entries.name: Habit Tracker Warm
entries.philosophy: Daily-ritual app warmth — soft accent per habit, gentle progress indicators, no dopamine-hijacking celebrations.

tokens.shadows: shadow-xs on cards, warm
tokens.type: humanist sans (Söhne, Inter) at 16-17px, restrained scale, generous line-height
tokens.color: warm cream base, accent per-habit (muted sage, dusty rose, pale ochre)
tokens.radius: 12-16px on cards, full on streak indicators
tokens.motion: gentle fade on check-off, no confetti, no celebration overload

entries.notes: Dopamine-hijacking animations (confetti, fanfare) are the failure mode — calm consistency builds habit, not celebration.

entries.name: Research Tool Precise
entries.philosophy: Academic-software clarity. Sidebar for sources, central reading pane, citation as first-class UI, no marketing flair.

tokens.shadows: shadow-xs on hover, shadow-sm on modals
tokens.type: Söhne or Inter body, serif allowed for source material, 15-16px body
tokens.color: white or cream base, neutral grays, single accent for citations (often blue-700)
tokens.motion: instant on selection, smooth on pane resize, no flourish

entries.notes: Don't add gradient hero panels — research-tool credibility comes from precision UI, not marketing decoration.

entries.name: Podcast Player Immersive
entries.philosophy: Audio app in dark mode — large cover art, generous play controls, transcript-aware. Listening as primary, browsing secondary.

tokens.shadows: shadow-lg on cover art for floating-card depth
tokens.type: Inter or SF Pro, 17-19px body for transcripts, large display for podcast titles
tokens.color: deep dark base, cover-art-derived accents, white-ish text
tokens.radius: 12-16px on cover art, full on play button
tokens.motion: smooth audio-progress, slow background-blur on hero cover, no flashy waveforms

entries.notes: Background blur of cover art is the signature touch — getting blur intensity right (not too smooth, not too pixelated) is the craft.

entries.name: Checkout Trust Minimal
entries.philosophy: Conversion-focused checkout — generous hit targets, minimal chrome, trust signals at every step, no distractions.

tokens.borders: 1.5px on focused inputs (clear active state), 1px on resting
tokens.shadows: shadow-xs on form sections, shadow-sm on completion
tokens.type: Inter or Söhne, 16-17px body (large enough for mobile), tabular for amounts
tokens.color: white base, near-black text, single brand accent for primary CTA only
tokens.motion: instant on focus, fast on validation, gentle success state — no celebration

entries.notes: Trust comes from the absence of distractions — adding hero gradients or marketing in checkout kills conversion.

entries.name: Social Feed Warm
entries.philosophy: Reading-feed warmth — soft cards, generous space, no engagement-bait, calm timeline for thoughtful content.

tokens.shadows: shadow-xs on cards, gentle
tokens.type: humanist sans body, 16-17px, generous line-height (1.55-1.65)
tokens.color: warm cream base, neutral text, accent reserved for actions (not engagement)
tokens.motion: ease-out 250-350ms, no infinite scroll teleport, no autoplay videos

entries.notes: If you optimize for engagement metrics, you'll drift back to dopamine UX — design discipline must hold the line.

entries.name: Music Creation Tool
entries.philosophy: DAW aesthetic for the browser. Hardware-inspired knobs, oscilloscope displays, monospace labels, expert-mode density.

tokens.borders: 1-2px on knobs and modules, often inset/recessed
tokens.shadows: object-realistic on knobs (top light), shadow-md on modules
tokens.type: monospace (Berkeley, JetBrains) for parameter labels, condensed sans for module names
tokens.color: near-black base, single accent per module type, oscilloscope green/amber
tokens.motion: knob rotation feedback, parameter-value flash on change, no UI-bounce

entries.notes: Hardware-inspired without becoming literal — abstract the knob, don't render a photorealistic one.
